extension.summary: Test TorBox CDN and real resolved download throughput.
extension.description: Utility add-on that measures TorBox CDN speedtest URLs and real TorBox requestdl links resolved from your existing Fen Light TorBox cloud settings.
extension.news: v0.1.0 - Add TorBox CDN speedtest runner using the TorBox speedtest API. - Add real TorBox cloud-file testing using Fen Light's TorBox token and requestdl flow. - Add latest Kodi-log resolved URL testing with token redaction in reports.
